field.label: Name
field.help: Set a name for your UPS.

field.label: Driver
field.help: Set the NUT driver used for this UPS. See the NUT hardware compatibility list for the driver matching your device.

field.label: Power Value
field.help: Set the number of power supplies this UPS feeds on this system. Use 0 to monitor the UPS without shutting down this system.

field.label: Arguments
field.help: Set arguments for this UPS, e.g. "port=auto". With multiple USB devices of the same driver, pin each UPS with "serial=...", or "vendorid=..." and "productid=...".
